testcase.name: Buscar artigo
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Buscar artigo &amp#27;[90m# src/test/resources/features/blog.feature:4&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mque acesso o blog do Agi&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# steps.BlogSteps.acessar()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mrealizo a busca por &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"pix"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# steps.BlogSteps.buscar(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mdevo visualizar resultados relevantes&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# steps.BlogSteps.validar()&amp#27;[0m
testcase.system-err: mar. 24, 2026 11:40:39 AM org.openqa.selenium.devtools.CdpVersionFinder findNearestMatch ADVERTÊNCIA: Unable to find CDP implementation matching 146 mar. 24, 2026 11:40:39 AM org.openqa.selenium.chromium.ChromiumDriver lambda$new$5 ADVERTÊNCIA: Unable to find version of CDP to use for 146.0.7680.164. You may need to include a dependency on a specific version of the CDP using something similar to `org.seleniumhq.selenium:selenium-devtools-v86:4.18.1` where the version ("v86") matches the version of the chromium-based browser you're using and the version number of the artifact is the same as Selenium's.
